# Pritika Kumari
HR Operations Specialist

MBA-qualified HR Operations professional with expertise in end-to-end employee lifecycle management, HRMS administration, and payroll coordination. I bring a detail-oriented approach and hands-on experience in onboarding, exit formalities, and compliance management.

Currently building HR analytics capabilities using Power BI, SQL, and Python to drive data-informed HR decisions and operational excellence.

## Expertise
- Core HR Operations: Employee Lifecycle Management, Onboarding & Exit Formalities, HRMS Administration, Payroll Coordination
- Technical Skills: Zoho Payroll/HRMS, Excel, Power BI, SQL, Python
- Competencies: Attention to Detail, Process Management, Data Analysis, Stakeholder Coordination

## Skills
- HR Operations
- HRMS Administration
- Employee Engagement
- Payroll Coordination
- Compliance Management
- HR Documentation
- Employee Lifecycle Management
- Data Analysis (Excel, Power BI, SQL, Python)
- Communication & Stakeholder Management

## Projects
- HR Analytics Dashboard: Designed interactive dashboards using Power BI to visualize HR metrics like attrition, headcount, and employee demographics. (Tools: Power BI)
- Employee Data Analysis: Analyzed employee data using SQL and Excel to generate insights for better decision-making and workforce planning. (Tools: SQL, Excel)
- HR Insights with Python: Built analytical reports using Python for data cleaning, analysis and automation of HR reporting processes. (Tools: Python)
